name: Workflow86
long_description:
Workflow86 provides a complete end-to-end platform for building agentic workflows and automating complex business processes and operations. 

Workflow86 provides users with a complete suite of tools to build and deploy custom agents and orchestrate them to perform complex, long-running workflows including human-in-the-loop steps, custom code, agent tools, and integrations with your existing systems. 

Build using a visual canvas, or simply describe the workflow in natural language with agents able to self-configure tools, prompts, and integrations, and even build the multi-agent workflows.
one_liner: Agentic workflows for complex, long running business operations
